title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【spring high】

seventh heaven fusion & latin jazz


今回は「Webster Lewis - EL BOBO」から「Jun Fukamachi - On The Move」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
青空に浮かぶ飛行機雲が目に浮かぶような、春らしい爽やかな空気感をお楽しみください。

This time, we bring you the transition from “EL BOBO” by Webster Lewis to “On The Move” by Jun Fukamachi.
Please enjoy the fresh, spring-like atmosphere that evokes the image of a jet trail drifting across a blue sky.


Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h5wswJfeyRw
